title: Student Feedback Process Review
description: Please share your insights on the effectiveness and impact of the feedback provided to students.

questions.label: How effective is the feedback students currently receive in helping them improve?
What is the primary characteristic of the feedback you believe students most often receive?
Do students typically receive feedback in a timely manner that allows them to apply it to subsequent tasks?
What specific areas or methods could be improved to make feedback more impactful for students?
What feedback format do you believe students find most beneficial?
To what extent does the current feedback system motivate students to learn and improve?
